page.title: Alerts
page.subtitle: Automatic anomaly detection · updated daily at 06:00

list.empty: No active alerts. Click "Run check now" to scan for anomalies.

card.detected: Detected {created} · Period: {period} · AI-generated — review before acting
card.confirmTooltip: Marks this day as a real one-time event so future predictions don't treat it as typical.
card.rejectTooltip: Treat this as a false alarm; the day stays in baseline averages.

modal.confirmBody: We'll exclude this day's actuals from baseline averages so future predictions don't treat it as typical. Add a quick note explaining what happened so the audit log preserves context.
modal.rejectBody: Mark this as a false alarm. The day stays in baselines. Optional note for the audit log.
modal.placeholder: e.g. Contract renewal — new OB rate took effect / Sportlov week / equipment failure cancelled service

page.title: Invoices
page.subtitle: AI-powered extraction — drag a PDF to add

drop.drop: Drop a PDF invoice here or click to upload
drop.hint: AI reads vendor, amount, date, line items and VAT — takes about 10 seconds

table.emptyAll: No invoices yet — upload your first PDF above
